title: 'Romelia Senki' Unveils Additional Cast, 2 Cours Broadcast
content:
The Pony Canyon booth at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed four additional cast and a second teaser visual (pictured) for the Romelia Senki ( Romelia War Chronicle ) television anime on Sunday. The anime series adapting Ryou Ariyama 's action fantasy light novel will air in two cours in 2026.

Cast Henri: Yuuya Hirose ( Mato Seihei no Slave ) Elisabeth: Sayaka Senbongi ( Tensei shitara Slime Datta Ken ) Ekaterina: Mariya Ise ( JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken Part 6: Stone Ocean ) Ryoki: Asaka ( Around 40 Otoko no Isekai Tsuuhan )

Hiroshi Shirai ( Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero episode director) is helming the anime at Atra . Aya Satsuki ( Kawaisugi Crisis ) is handling the series composition and penning the script. Yoshiko Saitou ( Towa no Yuugure ) and Yuuta Ootaka ( Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu 3rd Season animation director) is designing the characters. KOHTA YAMAMOTO ( Dark Gathering ) is composing the music.

Ariyama originally began penning the action fantasy novel on the Shousetsuka ni Narou website in August 2019. Shogakukan began printing the title under its Gagaga Books label in June 2020, featuring illustrations by Kodama . The sixth volume shipped in November 2025.

Ryou Kamito began drawing a manga adaptation on the Manga Doa app in April 2021. Mag Garden released the fifth volume in November 2025.

Seven Seas Entertainment licensed the manga in English in March 2025. The first volume was published on January 13, with the second volume scheduled for release on April 27.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Youchien Wars' Unveils Additional Cast, Studio, Teaser Promo for Spring 2027
content:
The Youchien Wars ( Kindergarten Wars ) White Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed additional cast, studio, an updated teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video on Sunday. The anime series adapting You Chiba 's action comedy manga will air in Spring 2027.

Cast Hana Bradley: Hitomi Oowada ( Hanebado! ) Luke Smith: Satoshi Hino ( Maou 2099 ) Silvia Scott: Mariya Ise ( Chainsaw Man )

Shinsuke Gomi ( Silent Witch episode director) is helming the anime at Sunrise and Felix Film NEW . Junko Yamanaka ( Servamp ) is designing the characters.

Chiba began serializing the manga on the Shounen Jump+ web magazine in September 2022. Shueisha published the 16th volume on January 5, with the 17th volume planned for an April 3 release.

Yen Press licensed the manga in English in October 2024 and released the third volume on January 20, with the fourth volume going on sale on April 28. Shueisha's Manga Plus platform also simulpublishes it in English, Spanish, Thai, and French.

Teaser PV
author: MyAnimeList

title: TRIGUN STARGAZE (English Dub) - Episode 22 - Martyr
content: Vash and Knives, and their respective allies, face off in a final showdown at the crash site where it all started.
author: Crunchyroll

title: TRIGUN STARGAZE - Episode 24 - QUO VADIS
content: The immigrant fleet arrives, and Knives single-handedly threatens to eliminate them.
author: Crunchyroll

title: TRIGUN STARGAZE (German Dub) - Episode 21 - Reunion
content: The crew, with its latest new member Livio, regroup at Hopeland to kick off their plan to stop Knives.
